name: bad-output
description: Tests gate retry/abort: stage demands strict JSON output but agent may produce prose. Gate should reject non-JSON output.

stages.name: generate-json
stages.prompt: IMPORTANT: Your output file must contain ONLY valid JSON — no markdown, no explanation, no code fences. Write this exact structure to the output file: a JSON object with keys 'product' (string), 'price' (number), 'features' (array of 3 strings), 'available' (boolean). Invent plausible values for an AI coffee machine. The output file must parse as valid JSON. No other text allowed.

stages.name: validate-json
stages.prompt: Read the previous stage's output. Verify it is valid JSON by parsing it. Write to your output file: if valid JSON, write { "valid": true, "keys": [list the top-level keys] }. If not valid JSON, write { "valid": false, "error": "description of what's wrong" }. Your output must also be pure JSON, no markdown.
